content: Please begin / continue a conversation topic (greetings are not needed). Ensure to change the topic if the current one is losing steam. The conversation should steer towards topics which reveal information about the characters and who they are, or instead drive forward previous conversations in their memory.

Lydia: Fucking Thalmor-loving tree-walkers probably still infesting these woods. hunter hunter: Sounds like you've got more than bandits to hunt. Saw some whore-brigands setting up camp west of here - looked eager for some... close encounters. Lydia: Good. More heads to cleave before MJR fills mine with his seed.

Lydia: By Dibella's divine tits, my Thane! Let me cleave this Imperial slut in half so I can suck your arrow-stuffed cock as my reward! Watch how I split her from groin to gullet with my blade! That's it my love, keep sniping from afar like the deadly hunter you are. I'll keep their throats exposed for your arrows while dreaming of you ravaging me atop their corpses later! hunter: Aye, that's some fine marksmanship. Though in my day we used to fuck the bandits killing them - tenderizes the meat something fierce. Lydia: Shut your filthy poacher mouth before I skullfuck you with my greatsword! My Thane's cock is the only one permitted to violate these whores!
